summary: Admin Transfers Queue Pagination - ALL FEATURES WORKING. 28/28 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all pagination controls present and functional.
critical_code_review_comments: - Default page_size is 20, invalid values default to 20
- Pagination works for all status tabs (SUBMITTED, COMPLETED, REJECTED)
- Search searches across ALL statuses with pagination (ignores status filter)
- Pagination response includes: page, page_size, total, total_pages, has_next, has_prev
- Frontend debounces search (300ms), resets to page 1 on tab/search/pagesize change
- PaginationControls component with First/Prev/Next/Last buttons working correctly
seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing transfers (40 SUBMITTED, 5 COMPLETED, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Transfers Queue pagination feature complete with: 1) Page size options (20/50/100, default 20), 2) Pagination controls (First/Prev/Next/Last buttons), 3) Showing X-Y of Z results display, 4) Page X of Y indicator, 5) Search across all statuses with pagination, 6) Tab switching resets to page 1.
features_verified: GET /api/v1/admin/transfers with pagination params - VERIFIED (28 tests passed)
Invalid page sizes default to 20 - VERIFIED
Pagination for SUBMITTED status - VERIFIED (40 transfers, 2 pages)
Pagination for COMPLETED status - VERIFIED (5 transfers, 1 page)
Page navigation (First, Prev, Next, Last) - VERIFIED
Search ignores status filter (searches ALL) - VERIFIED
Edge cases (page 0, negative page, page beyond total) - VERIFIED

ui_elements_verified.showing_results: Showing X-Y of Z results text
